_comment: Explicit blocklist of official / league / team Bluesky handles that should never be quoted, even if they slip into the reporter roster. The roster allowlist in data/sources/bluesky_handles.csv is the primary editorial gate; this is a belt-and-suspenders second gate. Handles are matched case-insensitively, exactly or as a subdomain (handle endswith '.<entry>'). Any handle containing 'nba.com' is blocked automatically. 'selfpromo_patterns' (v2.2) reject quote candidates whose first ~40 chars are self-promotion rather than observation; matched case-insensitively as substrings of the cleaned opening; a leading bare URL is also rejected in code.
